# Update Email Address

Shoppers can change the email address tied to their account from the profile settings page. After submitting a new address, a confirmation message is sent to it; the change takes effect only once that confirmation link is followed. The previous address continues to get order notifications until the new one is verified.

[Source: account_management.md#update-email-address]
